## Summary

Explain the change in plain language.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

If the change is docs-only, say so and explain which checks were skipped.

## Docs

- [ ] no doc update needed
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] product/architecture/operations docs updated

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out risky areas, follow-up work, screenshots, or sample Telegram output.
